name: Voluntary Employees' Beneficiary Associations (VEBA)

eligibility.description: Membership must consist of employees, and the association must provide for the payment of life, sick, accident, or other benefits.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exempts trusts used to pay life, sick, accident, or other benefits to members/dependents from income tax on investment earnings.
